channel.title: Quest Design on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Quest Design on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Eight Level Design Guidelines
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about eight level design guidelines.

item.title: Quest Types
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about quest types.

item.title: Escort Quests
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about escort quests.

item.title: Botched Quests And Player Freedom
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about botched quests and player Freedom.

item.title: Dynamic Quest Design
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Dynamic Quest Design.

item.title: Shopping Cart Theory
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about shopping cart Theory.

item.title: The Horizontal Slice
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the horizontal slice.

item.title: Companions
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about companions.

item.title: Quest Markers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about Quest markers.

item.title: Multiple Quest Solutions
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about multiple Quest Solutions and I want to use an example from Fallout that I used in my talk at the reboot conference in 2017.

item.title: Quest Implementation
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about Quest implementation.

item.title: Everything I learned from Disneyland
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to do something a little different.
